title: cyperus ostenii
intro: Cyperus ostenii, also known as Osten's sedge or Chinese flat sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus ostenii include reducing swelling and pain, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and infections. Cyperus ostenii can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
